recommendations.title: Christman in London - God Save the Queen
recommendations.overview: Two brothers go to London to try to score a sensational blow and kidnap the precious dogs of the Queen of England.

recommendations.title: Come tu mi vuoi
recommendations.overview: Giada is a overachieving student who works to pay for college. Riccardo is a spoiled brat who answers her tutoring ad in order to improve his abysmal grades. She's shy and homely. He's handsome and brazen. As they say, opposites attract.

recommendations.title: Help! My In-Laws Are Vampires!
recommendations.overview: A loving young couple discover they're expecting a child, but the man isn't too keen on introducing her girlfriend to his family. Is it because he has a vampire father, a witch mother, a ghostly grandma, and a zombie uncle?

recommendations.title: Natale Col Boss
recommendations.overview: Alex and Dino are two enstablished plastic surgeons used to change their patients' physical aspect with a few cuts of scalpel. Leo and Cosimo are two clumsy cops on the trails of a powerful and dangerous boss of which no one knows the face. All these

recommendations.title: The Whole Truth
recommendations.overview: A defense attorney works to get his teenage client acquitted of murdering his wealthy father.

recommendations.title: Irma la Douce
recommendations.overview: When a recently fired policeman falls in love with a French prostitute, he doesn't want her to be with other men, so he creates an alter-ego in order to become her only customer.

recommendations.title: Distracted
recommendations.overview: A comedy about an absent-minded man who works at a advertising company and topples from one problem to another.

recommendations.title: Hit Man
recommendations.overview: A mild-mannered professor moonlighting as a fake hit man in police stings ignites a chain reaction of trouble when he falls for a potential client.

recommendations.title: Love in the Afternoon
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged playboy becomes fascinated by the daughter of a private detective who has been hired to entrap him with a client's wife.

recommendations.title: My Days of Mercy
recommendations.overview: The daughter of a man on death row falls in love with a woman on the opposing side of her family's political cause.
